name: Dell XPS 13 Ultrabook
description: Ultra-thin and lightweight laptop perfect for business travelers. Features a stunning InfinityEdge display with vibrant colors and sharp text. Long battery life keeps you productive all day.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3
description: Supercharged by M3 chip for exceptional performance and all-day battery life. Fanless design means silent operation. Perfect for creative professionals on the go.

description: The legendary ThinkPad reliability in an ultralight carbon fiber chassis. Military-grade durability meets enterprise security features for demanding professionals.

name: HP Spectre x360 14

name: ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED
description: Vibrant OLED display in a compact, lightweight frame. NumberPad 2.0 on the touchpad adds productivity without extra bulk. Great for students and professionals.

name: Dell Inspiron 15 3000
description: Reliable everyday laptop for home and office use. Comfortable keyboard and ample storage make it ideal for daily tasks, browsing, and media consumption.

name: Apple MacBook Pro 14 M3 Pro

name: HP EliteBook 840 G10

name: Dell Latitude 5540

name: Lenovo Yoga 9i Gen 8

description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer adjusts to your environment. Crystal-clear hands-free calling with precise voice pickup technology.

description: Audiophile-grade wireless headphones with 60-hour battery life. Adaptive noise cancellation and transparent hearing let you stay connected to your world.

specs.Noise Cancellation: Active NC with Wind Noise Reduction

description: Custom-tuned noise cancellation that adapts to your ear canal. Aware Mode with ActiveSense lets important sounds through while blocking distractions.
